function.message: Updated Helios Tax Group follow-up date to 2026-03-10 with a focused diff by editing only the date fields in the reminder and owning account records.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied AGENTS.md rule to keep diffs focused and to update both reminder and owning account when rescheduling follow-up dates.
function.outcome_justification: Audit context in docs/follow-up-audit.json requested due date 2026-03-10 for acct_008 (Helios Tax Group). reminders/rem_008.json and accounts/acct_008.json both previously held 2026-02-19 and were updated to 2026-03-10 in due_on and next_follow_up_on respectively, preserving IDs and all other fields.
